## SAF1.4. Rate of separation minima infringements (SMIs) (PI#2)

At State level, Germany reported 25 separation minima infringements (SMI) in their airspace during 2025. The rate of separation minima infringements was lower than Union-wide average (1.93 vs 7.10). At ANSP level, Germany reported 27 SMIs with ATS/CNS contribution. The rate of separation minima infringements at ANSP level was lower than the Union-wide average (2.0 vs 6.0).

When comparing to 2024, the rate of separation minima infringements increased at State level (1.93 vs 0.78). Germany reported 0 SMI at ANSP level in 2024.
